supplementalResearch.title: 43. Speechmatics (UK) — TTS ✓ STT ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 43. Speechmatics (UK) — TTS ✓ STT ✓

**Status:** Active. Enterprise-grade with on-premises deployment.

**STT:** Enhanced and Standard models. **55+ languages**. Starting ~$0.24/hr (Pro). Medical model available. Real-time WebSocket. Free: **8 hrs/month**.

**TTS:** English only (expanding). **$0.011/1K chars** (11–27× cheaper than ElevenLabs). Free: **1M chars/month**. ~150ms latency.

On-premises, hybrid, on-device deployment. ISO 27001, SOC 2, HIPAA.
